button.class: user-select-none dropdown-toggle o-no-caret o-dropdown--narrow px-0 rounded-pill border-0 position-relative

div.class: o-discuss-CallMenu-buttonContent d-flex align-items-center btn-group rounded-pill overflow-hidden

o-discuss-CallMenu-channelInfo text-truncate btn btn-group-item border-0 m-0 p-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-1 o-ps-1_5 pe-1 rounded-2 rounded-end-0 align-self-stretch bg-inherit opacity-75 opacity-100-hover
div.title: Open Conversation

span.class: o-rounded-bubble h-100 py-2 border-end border-dark border-opacity-25

button.class: o-discuss-CallMenu-dropdownMore btn btn-group-item border-0 m-0 pe-1 o-ps-0_5 rounded-2 rounded-start-0 opacity-100-hover text-body
button.title: Select Actions

span.class: o-discuss-inCallIcon o-fw-600 rounded-circle d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center position-absolute z-3 bg-white
o-discuss-CallMenu-warningBadge o-fw-600 badge p-0 rounded-circle d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center o-discuss-warningBadge position-absolute bg-warning z-3
